study: SHAP Explanation Quality — Crisis Context Evaluators

questions.Q1: Does the prediction make sense given the highlighted words?
questions.Q2: Are the highlighted words actually relevant to detecting fake crisis content?
questions.Q3: Would you trust this explanation when making a quick decision during an actual crisis?

statistics.key_finding: 15 of 16 participants who rated Q2 adequate did not rate Q3 adequate. Understanding an explanation does not imply trusting it for crisis decisions.

comparison_hemt_fake.note: Same explanation method (SHAP), different evaluator profile. Gap reflects operational evidence requirements, not model quality.
